messages.content: Hello! How can I help you today?
Hello! I'm Kimi Code CLI, part of the Aurelio Agent network. How can I help you today?
The current time is **22:28:16 UTC** on **April 25, 2026** (Saturday).

Olá! Estou pronto como Kimi Code CLI na rede Aurelio Agent.

Posso executar tarefas diretamente ou delegar subtarefas a outros heterónimos quando necessário. O que precisas que eu faça?
I don't know your name yet—you haven't shared it with me in this conversation. If you'd like to tell me, I'm happy to use it!
